    Controls
    • CSM calendar – Must be updated daily. DM will document execution on all visits
    • VDI – spot check video; have a time for them to complete each day for easy watching on video. Still seeing TMs not walking around with laminated list
    • Controls environment all day every day / Expectation is zero findings – controls culture!
    • VDI will be going back to the open/close checklist and will be removed from the MAP. Stay Tuned!
    • EOD Process Simplification is coming which will help elimate steps when doing the dailys. MAP task coming soon.
